webpage_section.section_description: Root container for the cards-campaign block, holding the card grid with promotional campaign cards

difference_1.computed_style_change: display: grid vs block; grid-template-columns: 368px 368px 368px vs none; column-gap: 16px vs normal
difference_1.difference: The original card list uses CSS Grid with three 368px columns and 16px gaps, creating an even card grid. The migrated version uses block display with no grid, causing the cards to display in a single horizontal row without proper grid spacing. The overall card arrangement structure is different.

difference_2.element_description: First campaign card (image + text with CTA)
difference_2.computed_style_change: display: flex vs block; flex-direction: column vs row; border-radius: 8px vs 0px; background-color: rgb(251,177,117) vs transparent
difference_2.difference: The original first card uses vertical flex layout with 8px rounded corners and an orange background color. The migrated version uses block display, has no rounded corners, and a transparent background. The card appears as a flat, non-rounded element rather than a styled card component.

difference_3.element_description: First card text content area with heading, description, and CTA button
difference_3.difference: The text content area in the first card has no top padding in the migrated version (original 20px), making the heading sit flush against the top of the text area. The bottom padding increased from 20px to 32px.

difference_4.element_description: Second campaign card (image + text with CTA)
difference_4.computed_style_change: display: flex vs block; flex-direction: column vs row; border-radius: 8px vs 0px
difference_4.difference: The original second card uses vertical flex layout with 8px rounded corners. The migrated version uses block display with no rounded corners, appearing as a flat element.

difference_5.difference: The text content area in the second card has no top padding in the migrated version (original 20px), and increased bottom padding (32px vs 20px).
